title: Scripts
description:
Script definitions for the attachable, including initialization and animation triggers.

Properties:
• parent_setup
• pre_animation
• scale
• animate
• should_update_bones_and_effects_offscreen (boolean)
• should_update_effects_offscreen (boolean)

parent_setup.title: Parent Setup
parent_setup.description: Molang script executed when the attachable is set up on the parent entity. Used to set variables like 'variable.chest_layer_visible = 0.0;'.

pre_animation.title: Pre-Animation
pre_animation.description: Molang script executed before animations are processed.

scale.title: Scale
scale.description: Molang expression for the scale of the attachable.

animation_name.title: Animation Name
animation_name.description: Short name of an animation defined in the animations section.

anyOf.title: Animate (Array)
anyOf.description: Array of animation names to play.

animate.title: Animate
animate.description:
List of animations to play. Can be animation short names or objects with conditional playback.

Properties:
• animation_name (string)

should_update_bones_and_effects_offscree.title: Should Update Bones And Effects Offscreen
should_update_bones_and_effects_offscree.description: Whether bones and effects should be updated when the entity is offscreen.

should_update_effects_offscreen.title: Should Update Effects Offscreen
should_update_effects_offscreen.description: Whether effects should be updated when the entity is offscreen.

defaultSnippets.label: Scripts
defaultSnippets.description: Script definitions for the attachable, including initialization and animation triggers.
